summary: Frontend visual testing completed for Chitrakatha photography website. All requested features verified: team layout, rounded corners, hover animations, and hero slideshow.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@chitrakatha.com / admin123 (not tested - frontend only)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend visual tests passed. Verified: 1) About page team section displays 4 members (Upasak, Deep Shekhar, Debraj, Sandip) in single horizontal row on desktop (lg:grid-cols-4), 2) Team member images show faces clearly, 3) All cards/boxes have rounded corners (rounded-xl/rounded-2xl/rounded-lg), 4) Hero slideshow works with smooth transitions, 5) Hover animations work on cards, 6) Filter buttons on Gallery page have rounded corners, 7) Category tabs on Services page have rounded corners, 8) Navbar links visible and functional.

home_page.hero_slideshow: PASS - 3 slide indicators found, smooth transitions working
home_page.cta_buttons_rounded: PASS - View Packages and Explore Gallery buttons have rounded-lg
home_page.featured_cards_rounded: PASS - Featured work cards have rounded-xl
home_page.package_preview_cards_rounded: PASS - Package preview cards have rounded-xl

about_page.team_horizontal_layout: PASS - 4 team members displayed in single horizontal row (lg:grid-cols-4)
about_page.team_member_faces_visible: PASS - All 4 team member images show faces clearly
about_page.team_member_names: PASS - Upasak, Deep Shekhar, Debraj, Sandip all visible
about_page.team_cards_rounded: PASS - Team member cards have rounded-xl

services_page.category_tabs_rounded: PASS - Wedding, Pre-Wedding, Kids tabs have rounded-xl
services_page.addon_cards_rounded: PASS - Add-on service cards have rounded-2xl
services_page.book_now_buttons_rounded: PASS - Book Now buttons have rounded-xl
services_page.contact_modal: PASS - Modal opens on Book Now click

gallery_page.filter_buttons_rounded: PASS - All filter buttons (ALL, WEDDING, PRE-WEDDING, PORTRAIT, KIDS) have rounded-lg

navbar.navbar_visible: PASS - Navbar visible with logo and all nav links
navbar.nav_links: PASS - Home, Gallery, Services, About links visible
navbar.mobile_menu_toggle: PASS - Mobile menu toggle visible on mobile viewport

hover_animations.package_cards: PASS - Hover animations work (scale/border color changes)
hover_animations.team_cards: PASS - Hover animations work on team member cards
